---
title: "Wisconsin Agriculture"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

## Extension & Outreach

::: {.pub-item}
::: {.pub-title}
Agriculture's Contribution to the Wisconsin Economy
:::
Wisconsin agriculture and food processing industries contribute $116 billion to the Wisconsin economy.

[{{< fa arrow-right >}} Learn more](economy/){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary}
:::

::: {.pub-item}
::: {.pub-title}
Soil Health Economic Decision Tool
:::
Soil health practices are costly investments with complicated and uncertain payoffs. This decision-support tool helps farmers and conservation professionals understand the economics of practice adoption and allows users to adapt inputs to their unique context.

[{{< fa arrow-right >}} Learn more](conservation-decision-tool/){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary}
:::
